response.justification: Candidate has deep fullstack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and AWS, far exceeding the junior/mid-level requirements. Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD) and relevant platform-building experience align well with the role. Primary concern is significant overqualification for an entry-level position — likely mismatch on compensation expectations and long-term retention. PostgreSQL/Nest.js not explicitly mentioned, though easily learnable given the depth of experience.
strengths: Strong TypeScript, Node.js, React, and AWS experience across multiple production platforms
Demonstrated software craftsmanship: TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development
Berlin-based, meeting the on-site presence requirement
concerns: Severely overqualified — Staff/Senior level applying for junior/mid role suggests retention risk
No explicit PostgreSQL or Nest.js experience listed (MongoDB instead)
Only basic German, which may matter for a renewable energy/construction client-facing platform in DE
